scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n BACKEND,RAG,RASA,ACTIONS,FRONTEND -c yellow,magenta,cyan,blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:rag" "npm run dev:rasa" "npm run dev:actions" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: pushd backend && call .venv\Scripts\activate && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000 && popd
scripts.dev:rag: pushd rag-bot && call .venv\Scripts\activate && uvicorn api:app --reload --port 8001 && popd
scripts.dev:rasa: pushd rasa-bot && call .venv\Scripts\activate && chcp 65001 >NUL && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && set RASA_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 && set SQLALCHEMY_SILENCE_UBER_WARNING=1 && set TF_CPP_MIN_LOG_LEVEL=2 && rasa run --enable-api --cors "*" --response-timeout 120 --port 5005 --debug && popd
scripts.dev:actions: pushd rasa-bot && call .venv\Scripts\activate && chcp 65001 >NUL && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && rasa run actions --port 5055 --debug && popd
